description_long: This object is a delicate flowering plant branch featuring several broad, ovate green leaves and clusters of small white flowers. The flowers are composed of both prominent, showy petals and smaller, star-shaped blossoms grouped together. The main stem is slender and brownish, supporting the leaves and flower clusters at various intervals. The leaves have a smooth, matte surface with visible veins and are arranged alternately along the stem. The white petals are arranged in a somewhat radial pattern, with some overlapping and layering visible. This type of plant is commonly found in urban parks, gardens, or as decorative roadside vegetation.
description: A slender flowering plant branch with broad green leaves and clusters of white, radial flowers. The arrangement is natural and typical of ornamental urban vegetation.
description_view_0: This view highlights the broad, ovate leaves and the prominent white flower clusters, showing the overall fullness of the branch.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the slenderness of the stem and the layered arrangement of leaves and flowers along its length.
description_view_2: The top-down perspective showcases the leaf arrangement and the way the flowers are distributed among the foliage.
description_view_3: This view displays the elongated stem and the orientation of the leaves and flowers, with the white petals clearly visible at the end.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial pattern, with some overlapping and forming a whorled cluster. The arrangement is symmetrical and typical of many ornamental flowers.
